allow: Bash(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force data\\raw, data\\processed, notebooks, src\\model, src\\agent, src\\inference, src\\utils, demo_app, scripts)
PowerShell(python -c "import groq, shap, xgboost; print\('groq:', groq.__version__\); print\('shap:', shap.__version__\); print\('xgboost:', xgboost.__version__\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import lightgbm, xgboost, sklearn, shap, pandas, numpy, groq, streamlit, dotenv, joblib; print\('lightgbm', lightgbm.__version__\); print\('xgboost', xgboost.__version__\); print\('scikit-learn', sklearn.__version__\); print\('shap', shap.__version__\); print\('pandas', pandas.__version__\); print\('numpy', numpy.__version__\); print\('groq', groq.__version__\); print\('streamlit', streamlit.__version__\); print\('joblib', joblib.__version__\); print\('All OK'\)")
